system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_copy","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_COPY]
( 
	@Type         nvarchar(50), 
	@CodeProduct  nvarchar(max), 
	@CodeProduct2 nvarchar(max), 
	@UserName     nvarchar(50)
)
AS
BEGIN

    IF @Type = 'DGO'
    BEGIN
	   --- UPDATE THÔNG SỐ SẢN PHẨM ---
	   DECLARE @M2 DECIMAL(18, 5)
	   DECLARE @M3 DECIMAL(18, 5)
	   DECLARE @CBM DECIMAL(18, 10)
	   SELECT @M2 = m2, @M3 = m3, @CBM = cbm
	   FROM tr_sanpham
	   WHERE masp = @CodeProduct

	   UPDATE tr_sanpham
	   SET m2 = @M2,
		  m3 = @M3,
		  cbm = @CBM
	   WHERE masp = @CodeProduct2

	   --- UPDATE QUY CÁCH THÙNG CARTON ---
	   DELETE tr_sanpham_carton WHERE masp = @CodeProduct2
	   INSERT INTO tr_sanpham_carton(id, masp, mact, tenct, soluong, quycach1, quycach2, cbm2, GrossWeight, NetWeight)
	   SELECT NEWID() AS id, @CodeProduct2 AS masp, mact, tenct, soluong, quycach1, quycach2, cbm2, GrossWeight, NetWeight 
	   FROM tr_sanpham_carton
	   WHERE masp = @CodeProduct

	   --- COPY ĐỊNH MỨC ---
	   DELETE tr_dinhmuc_donggoi WHERE masp = @CodeProduct2
	   INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_donggoi
	   ( 
			masp
		   , madonggoi
		   , stt
		   , chitiet
		   , dai
		   , rong
		   , cao
		   , quycach
		   , soluong
		   , khoiluong
             , IsPacking
		   , vitri
		   , ghichu
		   , dvt
		   , nhom
		   , bophan_sudung
		   , ngaytao
		   , nguoitao
		   , ngaysua
		   , nguoisua
	   )
	   SELECT 
			@CodeProduct2
		   , madonggoi
		   , stt
		   , chitiet
		   , dai
		   , rong
		   , cao
		   , quycach
		   , soluong
		   , khoiluong
             , IsPacking
		   , vitri
		   , ghichu
		   , dvt
		   , nhom
		   , bophan_sudung
		   , GETDATE()
		   , @UserName
		   , GETDATE()
		   , @UserName
	   FROM   tr_dinhmuc_donggoi
	   WHERE  masp = @CodeProduct
    END

    IF @Type = 'NKI'
    BEGIN
	   DELETE tr_dinhmuc_ngukim WHERE masp = @CodeProduct2

	   INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_ngukim
	   ( 
			masp
		   , mavt
		   , chitiet
		   , quycach
		   , slchet
		   , slroi
		   , soluong
		   , dvt
		   , nhom
		   , HWforWW
		   , HWforPacking
		   , HWforAI
		   , bophan_sudung
		   , ghichu
		   , ngaytao
		   , nguoitao
		   , ngaysua
		   , nguoisua
	   )
	   SELECT 
			@CodeProduct2
		   , mavt
		   , chitiet
		   , quycach
		   , slchet
		   , slroi
		   , soluong
		   , dvt
		   , nhom
		   , HWforWW
		   , HWforPacking
		   , HWforAI
		   , bophan_sudung
		   , ghichu
		   , GETDATE()
		   , @UserName
		   , GETDATE()
		   , @UserName
	   FROM   tr_dinhmuc_ngukim
	   WHERE  masp = @CodeProduct;

	   EXEC TR_BOM_HTR_INSERT @CodeProduct2;
    END

    IF @Type = 'GVA'
    BEGIN
	   DELETE tr_dinhmuc_govan WHERE masp = @CodeProduct2

	   INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_govan
	   ( 
			masp
		   , mact
		   , stt
		   , chitiet
		   , nguyenlieu
		   , dayy_tc
		   , rong_tc
		   , dai_tc
		   , soluong_tc
		   , m3_tc
		   , dayy_sc
		   , rong_sc
		   , dai_sc
		   , m3_sc
		   , ghichu
		   , quytrinhgiacong
		   , hinhanh
		   , ngaytao
		   , nguoitao
		   , nguoisua
		   , ngaysua
	   )
	   SELECT 
			@CodeProduct2
		   , mact
		   , stt
		   , chitiet
		   , nguyenlieu
		   , dayy_tc
		   , rong_tc
		   , dai_tc
		   , soluong_tc
		   , m3_tc
		   , dayy_sc
		   , rong_sc
		   , dai_sc
		   , m3_sc
		   , ghichu
		   , quytrinhgiacong
		   , hinhanh
		   , GETDATE()
		   , @UserName
		   , @UserName
		   , GETDATE()
	   FROM   tr_dinhmuc_govan
	   WHERE  masp = @CodeProduct
    END

    IF @Type = 'SON'
    BEGIN
	   DELETE tr_dinhmuc_son WHERE masp = @CodeProduct2

	   INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_son
	   ( 
			masp
		   , stt
		   , buoc
		   , mact
		   , tenct
		   , sl_m2
		   , sl_sp
		   , dvt
		   , nhom
		   , bophan_sudung
		   , ghichu
		   , mamau
		   , nguoitao
		   , ngaytao
		   , nguoisua
		   , ngaysua
	   )
	   SELECT 
			@CodeProduct2
		   , stt
		   , buoc
		   , mact
		   , tenct
		   , sl_m2
		   , sl_sp
		   , dvt
		   , nhom
		   , bophan_sudung
		   , ghichu
		   , mamau
		   , nguoitao
		   , ngaytao
		   , nguoisua
		   , ngaysua
	   FROM   tr_dinhmuc_son
	   WHERE  masp = @CodeProduct
    END

    IF @Type = 'HTR'
    BEGIN
	   DELETE tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang WHERE masp = @CodeProduct2

	   INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang
	   ( 
			masp
		   , mact
		   , tenct
		   , soluong
		   , dvt
		   , ghichu
		   , ngaytao
		   , nguoitao
		   , ngaysua
		   , nguoisua
	   )
	   SELECT 
			@CodeProduct2
		   , mact
		   , tenct
		   , soluong
		   , dvt
		   , ghichu
		   , ngaytao
		   , nguoitao
		   , ngaysua
		   , nguoisua
	   FROM   tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang
	   WHERE  masp = @CodeProduct
    END
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_sanpham_carton"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_sanpham_carton"],"flags":["calls-other-proc","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
